section.div: 49% of my body is made of movies.

h2.span: Overall issues and pull requests status

div.div: 真夜中のドア〜stay with me (シングルver.)
As any British Subject state, conquer all of Britain.
As Canada, complete the Send in the Zombies focus.
As Canada, take and hold Washington D.C.
Play on the same server & map for 8 hours
Play on the same server & map for 4 hours
Find and break every web cache in Episode Two.
Save all buildings outside the missile silo from destruction.
Squish every antlion grub in Episode Two.
Send the garden gnome into space.
Complete 8 different levels sequentially under par time without dying on Ultra-Violence or higher.
Immolate a total of 30 arachnoid enemies with the Incinerator.
Obliterate 50 enemies with a single shot of the Calamity Blade.
